sentences.sentence: Virtually every child, the world over, plays.
sentences.translation: 世界各地几乎每个孩子都会玩耍。

structure.text: Virtually every child, the world over

difficult_points: Virtually 修饰 every child，表示“几乎每一个”。
the world over 是插入性短语，表示“全世界范围内”。

sentences.sentence: The drive to play is so intense that children will do so in any circumstances, for instance when they have no real toys, or when parents do not actively encourage the behavior.
sentences.translation: 玩耍的驱动力如此强烈，以至于孩子们在任何情况下都会这样做，例如当他们没有真正的玩具时，或当父母并不主动鼓励这种行为时。

structure.text: that children will do so in any circumstances
for instance when they have no real toys, or when parents do not actively encourage the behavior

difficult_points: so... that... 构成结果状语从句，说明玩耍驱动力强到什么程度。
do so 指代 play，避免重复前面的动词。
两个 when 从句并列，举例说明 any circumstances。

sentences.sentence: In the eyes of a young child, running, pretending, and building are fun.
sentences.translation: 在幼儿眼中，奔跑、假装游戏和搭建都很有趣。

structure.text: In the eyes of a young child

difficult_points: In the eyes of 表示从幼儿的视角来看。
running, pretending, and building 是三个并列动名词，共同作主语。
are 与复合主语保持复数一致。

sentences.sentence: Researchers and educators know that these playful activities benefit the development of the whole child across social, cognitive, physical, and emotional domains.
sentences.translation: 研究者和教育工作者知道，这些游戏性活动有益于儿童在社会、认知、身体和情感等领域的整体发展。

structure.text: that these playful activities benefit the development of the whole child across social, cognitive, physical, and emotional domains
across social, cognitive, physical, and emotional domains

difficult_points: know 后的 that 从句说明研究者和教育者的共识。
the whole child 指儿童全面发展，而非儿童身体本身。
across... domains 表示发展受益覆盖多个领域。

expressions.text: the development of the whole child

sentences.sentence: Indeed, play is such an instrumental component to healthy child development that the United Nations High Commission on Human Rights (1989) recognized play as a fundamental right of every child.
sentences.translation: 事实上，游戏对儿童健康发展如此关键，以至于联合国人权高级专员署（1989）把游戏承认为每个儿童的一项基本权利。

structure.text: is such an instrumental component to healthy child development
that the United Nations High Commission on Human Rights (1989) recognized play as a fundamental right of every child

difficult_points: such... that... 构成结果状语从句，强调 play 的重要性。
instrumental component 表示“起重要作用的组成部分”。
recognized play as... 使用 recognize A as B 结构。

expressions.meaning_zh: 对……起关键作用的组成部分

sentences.sentence: Yet, while experts continue to expound a powerful argument for the importance of play in children's lives, the actual time children spend playing continues to decrease.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管专家们继续有力论述游戏在儿童生活中的重要性，儿童实际用于玩耍的时间却仍在减少。

structure.text: while experts continue to expound a powerful argument for the importance of play in children's lives
the actual time children spend playing

difficult_points: Yet 和 while 共同形成转折，让专家观点与现实趋势对比。
children spend playing 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 the actual time。
continues to decrease 表示减少趋势仍在持续。

sentences.sentence: Today, children play eight hours less each week than their counterparts did two decades ago (Elkind 2008).
sentences.translation: 如今，孩子们每周玩耍的时间比二十年前的同龄人少八小时（Elkind 2008）。

structure.text: play eight hours less each week
than their counterparts did two decades ago

difficult_points: eight hours less each week 是比较结构中的差额。
their counterparts 指二十年前与当今儿童相对应的同龄孩子。
did 代替 played，避免重复动词。

sentences.sentence: Under pressure of rising academic standards, play is being replaced by test preparation in kindergartens and grade schools, and parents who aim to give their preschoolers a leg up are led to believe that flashcards and educational 'toys' are the path to success.
sentences.translation: 在学业标准不断提高的压力下，幼儿园和小学中的游戏正在被备考取代，而那些希望让学龄前儿童抢占优势的父母，也被引导去相信识字卡和教育性“玩具”才是通往成功的道路。

structure.text: Under pressure of rising academic standards
play is being replaced by test preparation in kindergartens and grade schools
and parents who aim to give their preschoolers a leg up are led to believe
who aim to give their preschoolers a leg up
that flashcards and educational 'toys' are the path to success

difficult_points: is being replaced 是现在进行时被动语态，强调正在发生的替代。
and 连接两个并列分句：学校中的变化与父母观念的变化。
who aim to... 修饰 parents，说明这类父母的目标。
that 从句是 believe 的内容，说明父母被引导接受的观念。

sentences.sentence: Our society has created a false dichotomy between play and learning.
sentences.translation: 我们的社会在游戏与学习之间制造了一种虚假的二分对立。

structure.text: a false dichotomy between play and learning

difficult_points: has created 使用现在完成时，强调这种二分观念已经形成并影响当下。
false dichotomy 表示把并不对立的两者错误地对立起来。
between play and learning 说明被人为分裂的两个概念。

sentences.sentence: Through play, children learn to regulate their behavior, lay the foundations for later learning in science and mathematics, figure out the complex negotiations of social relationships, build a repertoire of creative problem-solving skills, and so much more.
sentences.translation: 通过游戏，儿童学会调节自己的行为，为日后学习科学和数学奠定基础，理解社会关系中的复杂协商，建立一套创造性解决问题的技能，等等。

structure.text: learn to regulate their behavior, lay the foundations for later learning in science and mathematics, figure out the complex negotiations of social relationships, build a repertoire of creative problem-solving skills, and so much more

difficult_points: Through play 表示儿童学习这些能力的途径。
learn 后面并列多个动作：regulate、lay、figure out、build。
and so much more 表示前面列举并不穷尽。
creative problem-solving skills 是复合名词，强调创造性解决问题的能力。

sentences.sentence: There is also an important role for adults in guiding children through playful learning opportunities.
sentences.translation: 成人在引导儿童经历游戏化学习机会方面也发挥着重要作用。

structure.text: also an important role for adults
in guiding children through playful learning opportunities
guiding children through playful learning opportunities

difficult_points: There is 引出存在关系，强调成人也有重要角色。
for adults 限定 role 的承担者。
in guiding... 说明成人角色具体体现在哪里。

sentences.sentence: Full consensus on a formal definition of play continues to elude the researchers and theorists who study it.
sentences.translation: 关于游戏的正式定义，研究游戏的研究者和理论家们仍未达成完全共识。

structure.text: Full consensus on a formal definition of play
the researchers and theorists who study it

difficult_points: consensus on... 表示关于某事的共识。
elude 在此表示“使……难以获得”，即共识仍未形成。
who study it 修饰 researchers and theorists，it 指代 play。

sentences.sentence: Definitions range from discrete descriptions of various types of play such as physical, construction, language, or symbolic play (Miller & Almon 2009), to lists of broad criteria, based on observations and attitudes, that are meant to capture the essence of all play behaviors (e.g. Rubin et al. 1983).
sentences.translation: 这些定义既包括对身体游戏、建构游戏、语言游戏或象征性游戏等不同类型游戏的分项描述（Miller & Almon 2009），也包括基于观察和态度、旨在抓住所有游戏行为本质的一系列宽泛标准（如 Rubin 等 1983）。

structure.text: range from discrete descriptions of various types of play
that are meant to capture the essence of all play behaviors

difficult_points: range from... to... 表示定义范围从一种形式延伸到另一种形式。
such as... 举例说明 various types of play。
based on observations and attitudes 是过去分词短语，修饰 broad criteria。
that are meant to... 修饰 criteria，说明这些标准的目的。

sentences.sentence: A majority of the contemporary definitions of play focus on several key criteria.
sentences.translation: 当代关于游戏的大多数定义都聚焦于几个关键标准。

structure.text: A majority of the contemporary definitions of play

difficult_points: A majority of 表示“大多数”，中心含义落在 definitions。
contemporary definitions 指当代研究中的定义。
focus on several key criteria 说明这些定义的共同关注点。

sentences.sentence: The founder of the National Institute for Play, Stuart Brown, has described play as 'anything that spontaneously is done for its own sake'.
sentences.translation: 美国国家游戏研究所创始人 Stuart Brown 将游戏描述为“任何自发地为了其本身而进行的事情”。

structure.text: The founder of the National Institute for Play, Stuart Brown
play as 'anything that spontaneously is done for its own sake'
that spontaneously is done for its own sake

difficult_points: Stuart Brown 是同位语，解释 The founder 的具体身份。
describe A as B 表示“把 A 描述为 B”。
for its own sake 表示行为的目的在于行为本身，而非外在结果。

sentences.sentence: More specifically, he says it 'appears purposeless, produces pleasure and joy, [and] leads one to the next stage of mastery' (as quoted in Tippett 2008).
sentences.translation: 更具体地说，他说游戏“看似没有目的，会产生快乐和喜悦，并引导人进入下一个掌握阶段”（引自 Tippett 2008）。

structure.text: it 'appears purposeless, produces pleasure and joy, [and] leads one to the next stage of mastery'
appears purposeless, produces pleasure and joy, [and] leads one to the next stage of mastery

difficult_points: More specifically 表示本句进一步细化上一句定义。
it 指代 play，后面引号内容是 says 的宾语内容。
appears、produces、leads 三个谓语并列，描述 play 的特征。
[and] 表示引用中为语法连贯补出的连接词。

sentences.sentence: Similarly, Miller and Almon (2009) say that play includes 'activities that are freely chosen and directed by children and arise from intrinsic motivation'.
sentences.translation: 类似地，Miller 和 Almon（2009）说，游戏包括“由儿童自由选择和主导、并源于内在动机的活动”。

structure.text: that play includes 'activities that are freely chosen and directed by children and arise from intrinsic motivation'
that are freely chosen and directed by children and arise from intrinsic motivation

difficult_points: Similarly 表明该定义与 Stuart Brown 的定义方向相近。
that play includes... 是 say 的宾语从句。
that are freely chosen... 修饰 activities。
are freely chosen and directed 与 arise from 并列，共同描述这些活动。

sentences.sentence: Often, play is defined along a continuum as more or less playful using the following set of behavioral and dispositional criteria (e.g. Rubin et al. 1983):
sentences.translation: 通常，游戏会根据以下一组行为和倾向标准，被定义在一个从较少游戏性到较多游戏性的连续体上（如 Rubin 等 1983）：

structure.text: along a continuum as more or less playful
using the following set of behavioral and dispositional criteria

difficult_points: is defined 是被动语态，强调研究中如何界定 play。
along a continuum 表示不是二分判断，而是在连续体上定位。
more or less playful 表示游戏性程度高低。
using... criteria 说明界定所依据的标准。

sentences.sentence: Play is pleasurable: Children must enjoy the activity or it is not play.
sentences.translation: 游戏是令人愉悦的：儿童必须享受这项活动，否则它就不是游戏。
difficult_points: 冒号后具体解释 pleasurable 这一标准。
must enjoy 表示必要条件，不满足则不能称为 play。
it 指代前面的 the activity。

sentences.sentence: It is intrinsically motivated: Children engage in play simply for the satisfaction the behavior itself brings.
sentences.translation: 游戏由内在动机驱动：儿童参与游戏，只是为了这种行为本身带来的满足感。

structure.text: simply for the satisfaction the behavior itself brings

difficult_points: It 指代 play，intrinsically motivated 表示由内在动机驱动。
engage in play 表示参与游戏活动。
the behavior itself brings 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 satisfaction。

sentences.sentence: It has no extrinsically motivated function or goal.
sentences.translation: 它没有由外在动机驱动的功能或目标。

structure.text: no extrinsically motivated function or goal

difficult_points: It 继续指代 play。
no 放在名词短语前，否定 function or goal。
extrinsically motivated 与上一句 intrinsically motivated 构成对比。

sentences.sentence: Play is process oriented: When children play, the means are more important than the ends.
sentences.translation: 游戏以过程为导向：当儿童玩耍时，方式方法比结果更重要。

structure.text: are more important than the ends

difficult_points: process oriented 表示关注过程而不是结果。
When children play 是时间状语从句，说明该原则适用的情境。
the means 与 the ends 构成对比，分别指方式和结果。

sentences.sentence: It is freely chosen, spontaneous and voluntary.
sentences.translation: 它是自由选择的、自发的、出于自愿的。
difficult_points: It 指代 play。
freely chosen, spontaneous and voluntary 是三个并列形容词或分词成分。
该句强调游戏必须来自儿童自愿，而非外部压力。

sentences.sentence: If a child is pressured, they will likely not think of the activity as play.
sentences.translation: 如果儿童受到压力，他们很可能不会把这项活动看作游戏。
difficult_points: If 引导条件从句，说明外部压力会改变儿童对活动的看法。
they 是单数含义的代词，回指 a child。
think of the activity as play 使用 think of A as B 结构。

sentences.sentence: Play is actively engaged: Players must be physically and/or mentally involved in the activity.
sentences.translation: 游戏需要积极投入：参与者必须在身体和/或心理上投入到活动中。

structure.text: must be physically and/or mentally involved

difficult_points: 冒号后解释 actively engaged 的含义。
physically and/or mentally 表示身体或心理任一方面或两方面的投入。
be involved in 表示参与或投入某项活动。

sentences.sentence: Play is non-literal.
sentences.translation: 游戏具有非字面性。
difficult_points: non-literal 表示游戏内容不必按现实或字面意义理解。
该句为下一句 make-believe 作概念铺垫。

sentences.sentence: It involves make-believe.
sentences.translation: 它包含假装和想象。
difficult_points: It 指代 play。
make-believe 是名词，指假装、想象性的游戏内容。

sentences.sentence: According to this view, children's playful behaviors can range in degree from 0% to 100% playful.
sentences.translation: 根据这种观点，儿童行为的游戏性程度可以从 0% 到 100% 不等。
difficult_points: According to this view 指代前文连续体定义的观点。
can range in degree 表示程度可以变化。
from 0% to 100% playful 把游戏性视为连续尺度。

sentences.sentence: Rubin and colleagues did not assign greater weight to any one dimension in determining playfulness; however, other researchers have suggested that process orientation and a lack of obvious functional purpose may be the most important aspects of play (e.g. Pellegrini 2009).
sentences.translation: Rubin 及其同事并未在判断游戏性时给任何一个维度赋予更大权重；然而，其他研究者提出，过程导向和缺乏明显功能性目的可能是游戏最重要的方面（如 Pellegrini 2009）。

structure.text: did not assign greater weight to any one dimension
that process orientation and a lack of obvious functional purpose may be the most important aspects of play

difficult_points: 分号连接两个相关但转折的分句，however 标明后文转折。
assign greater weight to 表示在判断中赋予更高权重。
in determining playfulness 说明权重分配发生在判断游戏性时。
that 从句是 suggested 的宾语从句，提出其他研究者的观点。

sentences.sentence: From the perspective of a continuum, play can thus blend with other motives and attitudes that are less playful, such as work.
sentences.translation: 从连续体的角度看，游戏因而可以与其他游戏性较弱的动机和态度融合，例如工作。

structure.text: From the perspective of a continuum
can thus blend with other motives and attitudes

difficult_points: From the perspective of... 表示从某一理论角度出发。
thus 承接前文连续体观点，推出游戏可与其他动机混合。
that are less playful 修饰 motives and attitudes。
such as work 举例说明游戏性较弱的活动。

sentences.sentence: Unlike play, work is typically not viewed as enjoyable and it is extrinsically motivated (i.e. it is goal oriented).
sentences.translation: 与游戏不同，工作通常不被视为令人愉快，而且它由外在动机驱动（即以目标为导向）。

structure.text: is typically not viewed as enjoyable

difficult_points: Unlike play 明确把 work 与 play 对比。
is viewed as 是被动结构，表示通常如何看待工作。
it 指代 work。
括号中的 i.e. 进一步解释 extrinsically motivated。

sentences.sentence: Researcher Joan Goodman (1994) suggested that hybrid forms of work and play are not a detriment to learning; rather, they can provide optimal contexts for learning.
sentences.translation: 研究者 Joan Goodman（1994）提出，工作与游戏的混合形式并不会损害学习；相反，它们能够为学习提供最佳情境。

structure.text: that hybrid forms of work and play are not a detriment to learning
rather, they can provide optimal contexts for learning

difficult_points: suggested 后的 that 从句说明 Goodman 的观点。
hybrid forms of work and play 指工作与游戏混合的形式。
分号后的 rather 表示纠正或反向强调。
they 指代 hybrid forms。

sentences.sentence: For example, a child may be engaged in a difficult, goal-directed activity set up by their teacher, but they may still be actively engaged and intrinsically motivated.
sentences.translation: 例如，儿童可能参与一项由老师设置的、有难度且目标导向的活动，但他们仍然可能积极投入并受到内在动机驱动。

structure.text: a child may be engaged in a difficult, goal-directed activity
but they may still be actively engaged and intrinsically motivated

difficult_points: For example 引出前一句 hybrid forms 的具体例子。
set up by their teacher 是过去分词短语，修饰 activity。
but 表明教师设置目标与儿童仍有内在动机并不矛盾。
they 是单数含义的代词，回指 a child。

sentences.sentence: At this mid-point between play and work, the child's motivation, coupled with guidance from an adult, can create robust opportunities for playful learning.
sentences.translation: 在游戏与工作之间的这个中间点上，儿童的动机加上成人的指导，能够创造出强有力的游戏化学习机会。

structure.text: At this mid-point between play and work
coupled with guidance from an adult

difficult_points: At this mid-point 回指前文 play 与 work 混合的中间状态。
coupled with... 是过去分词短语，补充说明 motivation 与成人指导结合。
can create 表示这种结合可能带来学习机会。
robust opportunities 强调机会强而有效。

sentences.sentence: Critically, recent research supports the idea that adults can facilitate children's learning while maintaining a playful approach in interactions known as 'guided play' (Fisher et al. 2011).
sentences.translation: 关键的是，近期研究支持这样一种观点：成人可以在被称为“引导式游戏”的互动中保持游戏化方法，同时促进儿童学习（Fisher 等 2011）。

structure.text: the idea that adults can facilitate children's learning while maintaining a playful approach
that adults can facilitate children's learning while maintaining a playful approach

difficult_points: Critically 表示作者强调这一研究结论的重要性。
that adults can... 是同位语从句，解释 the idea 的内容。
while maintaining... 表示成人促进学习的同时保持游戏化方式。
known as 'guided play' 后置修饰 interactions。

expressions.text: recent research supports the idea that
expressions.meaning_zh: 近期研究支持……这一观点

sentences.sentence: The adult's role in play varies as a function of their educational goals and the child's developmental level (Hirsh-Pasek et al. 2009).
sentences.translation: 成人在游戏中的角色会随着其教育目标和儿童发展水平而变化（Hirsh-Pasek 等 2009）。

structure.text: as a function of their educational goals and the child's developmental level

difficult_points: role in play 表示成人在游戏过程中的作用。
varies as a function of 表示随某些变量变化。
their educational goals 中 their 指成人的目标，与 the child's developmental level 并列。

sentences.sentence: Guided play takes two forms.
sentences.translation: 引导式游戏有两种形式。
difficult_points: Guided play 承接上一段引入的概念。
takes two forms 中 take 表示“呈现为”。

sentences.sentence: At a very basic level, adults can enrich the child's environment by providing objects or experiences that promote aspects of a curriculum.
sentences.translation: 在最基本的层面上，成人可以通过提供能促进课程某些方面的物品或体验，来丰富儿童的环境。

structure.text: by providing objects or experiences that promote aspects of a curriculum
that promote aspects of a curriculum

difficult_points: At a very basic level 表示这是较基础的一种引导形式。
by providing... 表示成人丰富环境的手段。
that promote... 修饰 objects or experiences。
aspects of a curriculum 指课程中的某些方面。

sentences.sentence: In the more direct form of guided play, parents or other adults can support children's play by joining in the fun as a co-player, raising thoughtful questions, commenting on children's discoveries, or encouraging further exploration or new facets to the child's activity.
sentences.translation: 在更直接的引导式游戏形式中，父母或其他成人可以通过作为共同游戏者参与乐趣、提出有启发性的问题、评论儿童的发现，或鼓励进一步探索或活动的新方面，来支持儿童的游戏。

structure.text: In the more direct form of guided play
by joining in the fun as a co-player, raising thoughtful questions, commenting on children's discoveries, or encouraging further exploration or new facets to the child's activity
joining in the fun as a co-player, raising thoughtful questions, commenting on children's discoveries, or encouraging further exploration or new facets to the child's activity

difficult_points: In the more direct form... 与上一句的 very basic level 形成对比。
by 后接多个并列动名词，列举成人支持儿童游戏的方式。
as a co-player 说明成人不是旁观者，而是共同参与者。
new facets to the child's activity 指儿童活动的新方面或新角度。

sentences.sentence: Although playful learning can be somewhat structured, it must also be child-centered (Nicolopoulou et al. 2006).
sentences.translation: 尽管游戏化学习可以有一定结构，但它也必须以儿童为中心（Nicolopoulou 等 2006）。

structure.text: Although playful learning can be somewhat structured

difficult_points: Although 引导让步从句，承认游戏化学习可以有结构。
it 指代 playful learning。
must also be child-centered 强调即使有结构，也不能偏离儿童中心。

sentences.sentence: Play should stem from the child's own desire.
sentences.translation: 游戏应源自儿童自身的愿望。
difficult_points: should 表示规范性要求。
stem from 表示来源，强调游戏动机应来自儿童本人。
own 强化 desire 属于儿童自身而非成人外加。

sentences.sentence: Both free and guided play are essential elements in a child-centered approach to playful learning.
sentences.translation: 自由游戏和引导式游戏都是以儿童为中心的游戏化学习方法中的必要要素。

structure.text: in a child-centered approach to playful learning

difficult_points: Both... and... 强调自由游戏与引导式游戏两者都重要。
essential elements 表示不可缺少的组成部分。
approach to playful learning 中 to 是介词，后接名词短语。

sentences.sentence: Intrinsically motivated free play provides the child with true autonomy, while guided play is an avenue through which parents and educators can provide more targeted learning experiences.
sentences.translation: 由内在动机驱动的自由游戏赋予儿童真正的自主性，而引导式游戏则是一条途径，父母和教育者可以借此提供更有针对性的学习体验。

structure.text: provides the child with true autonomy
while guided play is an avenue
through which parents and educators can provide more targeted learning experiences

difficult_points: while 在这里表示对比，连接 free play 与 guided play 的不同功能。
provides the child with true autonomy 使用 provide A with B 结构。
through which 引导定语从句，which 指代 an avenue。
more targeted learning experiences 指更有针对性的学习体验。

sentences.sentence: In either case, play should be actively engaged, it should be predominantly child-directed, and it must be fun.
sentences.translation: 无论哪种情况，游戏都应当让儿童积极投入，应当主要由儿童主导，并且必须有趣。
difficult_points: In either case 指自由游戏和引导式游戏两种情况。
三个并列分句共同列出 play 必须满足的条件。
it 在后两个分句中都指代 play。
predominantly child-directed 表示主要由儿童主导，而非完全由成人控制。
